lost_token.title: Recover the Lost Token
lost_token.summary: Play Cabinet 07 and bring the Lost Token back to Mira.
lost_token.details: Mira says Cabinet 07 has the Lost Token. Recover it, then return to the ticket counter.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mira
completion_dialogue.text: It remembered enough to give this back.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mira
completion_dialogue.text: That means something in here still knows you.

truth_filter.title: Truth Filter
truth_filter.summary: Meet Mr. Byte in Cabinet Row and open the Truth Filter.
truth_filter.details: The Lost Token woke a memory, but the arcade is still filtering the truth. Mr. Byte can open the Truth Filter from Cabinet Row.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Byte
completion_dialogue.text: Warning: restored subjects may now notice missing pieces.

circuit_soda.title: Circuit Soda
circuit_soda.summary: Stabilize the signal flow through Vendo's machine.
circuit_soda.details: Vendo claims the player's signal is being routed through the wrong channels. The Circuit Soda puzzle should make the signal easier for the staff systems to read.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Vendo
completion_dialogue.text: Your signal now flows smoother than orange soda through a busted hose.

maintenance_sync.title: Maintenance Sync
maintenance_sync.summary: Stabilize the two signals needed by the Staff Door.
maintenance_sync.details: Gus says the Staff Door listens for two stable signals. The maintenance system needs both signals active before the Staff Room can open.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Gus
completion_dialogue.text: Door finally heard both of you.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Gus
completion_dialogue.text: Try not to think too hard about that sentence.

broken_high_score.title: Broken High Score
broken_high_score.details: The score claims the target is 9999, but the display is broken. The real record may be much smaller and much stranger.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Roxy
completion_dialogue.text: Name stayed blank. That is usually bad.

prize_counter_secret.title: Prize Counter Secret
prize_counter_secret.summary: Find the prize counter's hidden memory.
prize_counter_secret.details: The prize counter remembers small things: cheap prizes, saved tickets, and someone who never clocked out.

completion_dialogue.speaker: Pip
completion_dialogue.text: The cheap ones remember who wanted them.
